data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 12/19 (Mon), Schedule & Scrimmages rewards will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students and exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 12/19 (Mon) 19:00 – 12/26 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
